历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category/Science was approximately 6836→11357→9627→7542→10738, with significant fluctuations. In 2025, the ranking shifted back by about 3196 places compared to 2024, with a baseline ranking of approximately 10738. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for Science/Physics Category were 18→70→72→63→62, stabilizing after a major expansion in 2022. In 2026, the planned enrollment is 67, an increase of 5 students (about 8.1% expansion) compared to 2025, which will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has risen continuously from 100th in 2021 to 79th in 2026, with steady improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's overall strength. In 2026, there is no significant negative public opinion regarding reputation; Douyin popularity ranking is 80th, rated as "average," with moderate exposure. No record of filing gaps in the past five years, indicating stable application psychology. Ethnology is A+ (top in the country), Chinese Language and Literature is A-, Sociology is A-, which are weakly related to Physics Category enrollment majors, but the 985 platform still attracts science and engineering candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information continue to be highly popular socially. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Shanxi Province is approximately 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competition. Minzu University of China is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal for Shanxi candidates. In 2026, the Physics Category plans to enroll 67 students, a relatively large scale, which is favorable for candidates applying.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 10738, the 2026 planned enrollment expansion of about 8.1% (intensifying competition), the slight decrease of about 3.4% in Shanxi Physics Category candidates (slightly easing competition), and the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking, the expansion effect outweighs the candidate reduction effect. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will shift back to approximately 11278, with a range of 10778–11778. The enrollment plan expansion is the most critical factor driving the ranking backward.

If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 11500), it is advisable to mainly choose Tier 3 majors, while also considering Tier 2 majors with lower rankings.
